file.content:
name: marketplace-health

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
    paths:
      - 'skills/**'
      - '.agents/skills/**'
      - '.github/workflows/marketplace-health.yml'
  pull_request:
    paths:
      - 'skills/**'
      - '.agents/skills/**'

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  health-sweep:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.12'

      - name: Run marketplace-validator
        # Fails on hard failures only; warnings (local frontmatter extensions,
        # description word count over 50) are advisory and allowed.
        run: python3 .agents/skills/marketplace-validator/scripts/validate.py skills/

      - name: Run marketplace-health sweep
        # Without --no-fail: hard failures (broken cross-refs, manifest
        # divergence, missing licenses, doc-state mismatch) fail the build.
        run: python3 .agents/skills/marketplace-health/scripts/health.py

      - name: Upload health report
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: health-report
          path: docs/principled/marketplace-health/*.md
